goal: Drain the inbox strictly by weight on the fully hardened pipeline (build-floor + graduated-remediation + S5 quarantine + statemap CAS all live). Structural band first: acs-verdict-always-written-with-reason and ship-eligibility-decision-artifact (no silent refusals — every floor decision records its blocking findings), ship-landed-verification-floor, loop-must-base-lanes-on-origin-main, percycle-audit-apicover-newexport-parity (redesign the reproduction against a TEMP module copy; flip its skip back to a hard pin), topn-task-id-injection (committed ids as plumbing not prose). Then codegraph blast-radius per docs/architecture/code-graph-blast-radius.md and the token-efficiency stack. Every fix: TDD red-first, regression test, adversarial audit, wiring proof in the composed path. No inert API. Tests must NEVER mutate the live repo tree.

phases.name: cycle-recorded
phases.key_findings: cycle completed; ledger walk deferred to future slice
